title: Set 3: A Day at the Sea 🌊
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.

for the day. We carried our bags across the sand and found a good place to sit. The water was beautiful and blue. While I was swimming, I saw two

jumping in the water. They were very friendly!

my camera in the car! Aunt Mary said, "Don't worry, we can come back tomorrow." It was the best day of my summer holiday.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A long walk in the park
A fun day by the water
A new camera for my birthday

explanations_vi: Nhìn thấy cá heo (dolphins) nhảy dưới nước.
Tìm vỏ sò (shells) dọc bờ biển.
Đi thuyền ra một hòn đảo nhỏ (island).
Sóng (waves) hơi cao làm thuyền dập dìu.
Tiêu đề B (Một ngày vui vẻ bên mặt nước) tóm tắt đúng nhất về câu chuyện.
